title: Hug a Tree, Geronimo
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo buys his childhood farm to protect the legendary Great Oak from a greedy company that wants to build a mall. 🌳

q.en: Who calls Geronimo on the first day of spring to stop him from daydreaming?
q.zh: 在春天第一天，是谁打电话给杰罗尼摩，不让他做白日梦？

explain.en: Grandfather William calls and uses a countdown to force Geronimo to get to the office quickly.
explain.zh: 爷爷威廉打来电话，还用倒数计时的方式逼着杰罗尼摩赶紧去办公室上班。

q.en: What tool did Grandfather William invent to watch for slackers?
q.zh: 威廉爷爷发明了什么工具来监视偷懒的人？

explain.en: The slacker alarm is a complicated tool that monitors Geronimo's daydreaming and work performance.
explain.zh: 偷懒警报器是一个复杂的工具，用来监视杰罗尼摩做白日梦和工作的表现。

q.en: Where does Geronimo land after flying over a tree trunk on his bike?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩骑着自行车飞过一段树干后，落在了哪里？

options.zh: 在一个发臭的堆肥堆里

explain.en: He slams on the brakes, flips over the trunk, and slides snout-down into a smelly compost heap.
explain.zh: 他猛踩刹车，从树干上翻了出去，脸朝下一路滑进了一个臭烘烘的堆肥堆。

q.en: What legendary tree stands on the hilltop near the Stilton family farm?
q.zh: 在斯蒂尔顿家农场附近的山顶上，矗立着一棵什么传奇大树？

explain.en: Geronimo recognizes it as the legendary Great Oak from his childhood summers at the farm.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩认出那是他小时候在农场度夏时见过的大橡树。

q.en: What is Dr. Otto Cheesecake's job at The Rodent's Gazette?
q.zh: 奥托·芝士蛋糕博士在《 rodent  Gazette 报》担任什么工作？

explain.en: He is Geronimo's personal dietician who writes the 'You Are What You Eat' column.
explain.zh: 他是杰罗尼摩的私人营养顾问，还写一个名为「你吃什么就像什么」的专栏。

q.en: Where is the farm that Geronimo buys located?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩买下的农场位于什么地方？

explain.en: The farm is in the Happy Hills, the same place where Geronimo spent his childhood summers.
explain.zh: 农场位于快乐山丘，正是杰罗尼摩小时候每年夏天待过的地方。

q.en: Why does Madame No want to buy the Great Oak property?
q.zh: 诺夫人想买下大橡树所在的地皮是为了什么？

options.en: To cut it down and build a mall
options.zh: 砍掉树并建一座购物中心

explain.en: EGO Corp, led by Madame No, plans to cut down the tree to make room for a huge shopping mall.
explain.zh: 诺夫人掌管的巨型企业计划砍掉大树，腾出地方建一座巨大的购物中心。

q.en: Who placed the secret stone at the foot of the Great Oak?
q.zh: 是谁在大橡树脚下放下了那块秘密石碑？

explain.en: Grant Gentlemouse, founder of New Mouse City, placed the wishing stone beneath the Great Oak.
explain.zh: 新老鼠城的创立者格兰特·绅士鼠在大橡树下放下了这块许愿石碑。

q.en: How do Geronimo and his friends raise money for the auction?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和朋友们是怎么为拍卖会筹钱的？

options.en: By printing a special edition newspaper
options.zh: 通过印刷一期特刊报纸

explain.en: Grandfather runs a special edition of The Rodent's Gazette and all proceeds go to the auction.
explain.zh: 爷爷发行了一期《鼠民公报》特刊，所有收入都用来参加拍卖会。

q.en: What do Geronimo and his friends decide to do to save the Great Oak?
q.zh: 为了拯救大橡树，杰罗尼摩和朋友们决定怎么做？

options.en: Go to the auction and win it

explain.en: Flora suggests they attend the auction and win, and the group shouts 'We will protect the Great Oak!'
explain.zh: 弗洛拉提议他们去参加拍卖会并拍下地皮，大家一起喊「我们要保护大橡树」。
